Tomato Early Blight.description: A fungal disease (Alternaria solani) affecting tomato leaves, causing leaf spots and lesions
Tomato Early Blight.symptoms: Brown circular spots with concentric rings on lower leaves, yellow halo around lesions
Tomato Early Blight.prevention_tips: Remove infected leaves promptly, improve air circulation, avoid overhead watering, use drip irrigation, mulch plants, rotate crops yearly
Tomato Early Blight.spray_schedule: Every 7-10 days starting from early stages

Tomato Late Blight.description: A serious fungal disease (Phytophthora infestans) occurring in cool, wet conditions
Tomato Late Blight.symptoms: Water-soaked spots on leaves and stems, white mold on undersides, rapid spreading, fruit rot
Tomato Late Blight.prevention_tips: Use resistant varieties, reduce humidity, ensure proper spacing, avoid wet foliage, remove infected plants immediately, fungicide application
Tomato Late Blight.recommended_fertilizer: Calcium nitrate to strengthen plant tissue

Tomato Leaf Spot.description: Bacterial disease (Xanthomonas) causing lesions on tomato leaves
Tomato Leaf Spot.symptoms: Small dark brown or black spots on leaves with yellow halos, spots with watery appearance
Tomato Leaf Spot.prevention_tips: Use disease-resistant seeds/varieties, avoid wet foliage, sanitize tools between plants, remove infected leaves, proper spacing
Tomato Leaf Spot.suggested_pesticide: Copper-based bactericide, Streptomycin, or fixed copper

Tomato Septoria Leaf Spot.description: Fungal disease caused by Septoria lycopersici
Tomato Septoria Leaf Spot.symptoms: Circular lesions with dark edges and gray centers, small black dots (pycnidia) in center, premature leaf drop
Tomato Septoria Leaf Spot.prevention_tips: Remove lower infected leaves, improve air circulation, avoid overhead watering, stake plants, remove crop residue

Tomato Yellow Leaf Curl.symptoms: Yellowing of leaves, leaf curling, stunted growth, reduced fruit production
Tomato Yellow Leaf Curl.prevention_tips: Control whitefly population, use reflective mulch, remove infected plants, plant resistant varieties, screen greenhouses
Tomato Yellow Leaf Curl.suggested_pesticide: Insecticide for whitefly control (Neem oil, Pyrethrin)
Tomato Yellow Leaf Curl.recommended_fertilizer: High potassium fertilizer to boost immunity
Tomato Yellow Leaf Curl.spray_schedule: Weekly or as needed for pest control

Potato Early Blight.description: Fungal disease caused by Alternaria solani affecting potato foliage
Potato Early Blight.symptoms: Brown circular spots with concentric rings on lower leaves, yellowing around spots, rapid spread during warm season
Potato Early Blight.prevention_tips: Remove infected foliage, good drainage, crop rotation (2-3 years), avoid overhead watering, mulching, use resistant varieties

Potato Late Blight.description: Most destructive potato disease in cool, wet weather caused by Phytophthora infestans
Potato Late Blight.symptoms: Water-soaked spots spreading rapidly, white mold on leaf undersides, stem rot, tuber decay
Potato Late Blight.prevention_tips: Use resistant varieties, destroy infected plants, proper ventilation, avoid wet foliage, crop rotation, remove plant debris

Corn Common Rust.description: Fungal rust disease of corn causing pustules on leaves
Corn Common Rust.symptoms: Reddish-brown pustules on upper and lower leaf surfaces, severe damage in late season
Corn Common Rust.prevention_tips: Use resistant hybrids, adequate spacing, remove crop debris, avoid stress, timely irrigation

Corn Gray Leaf Spot.description: Fungal disease caused by Cercospora zeae-maydis
Corn Gray Leaf Spot.symptoms: Long narrow lesions on leaves, gray-brown color, lesions merge causing large dead areas
Corn Gray Leaf Spot.prevention_tips: Use resistant hybrids, crop rotation, remove crop residue, adequate spacing, avoid excess nitrogen

Healthy Leaf.description: No disease detected - the leaf is healthy and disease-free
Healthy Leaf.symptoms: None - leaf appears healthy with normal color and texture
Healthy Leaf.prevention_tips: Continue regular monitoring and maintenance, proper watering, adequate sunlight, balanced fertilization
